ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Customer preferences (e.g., favorite categories, brands, styles) */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Loyalty program information */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Customer feedback */,
  "ratings" INTEGER /* Customer ratings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the measurement */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the customer (e.g., 4, 6, 8) */,
  "shoulder_breadth" REAL /* Shoulder breadth of the customer in inches */,
  "upper_arm_girth" REAL /* Upper arm girth of the customer in inches */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement of the customer in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement of the customer in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement of the customer in inches */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam of the customer in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length of the customer in inches */,
  "neck_circumference" REAL /* Neck circumference of the customer in inches */,
  "measurement_status" TEXT /* Status of the measurement (e.g., Valid, Invalid, Pending) */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_size FOREIGN KEY ("size") REFERENCES sizes ("size")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size value (e.g., 4, 6, 8) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_chart" TEXT /* Size chart for the size */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* Size standard (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size associated with the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the clothing item */,
  "video" TEXT /* Video of the clothing item */,
  "reviews" TEXT /* Reviews of the clothing item */,
  "ratings" INTEGER /* Ratings of the clothing item */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the clothing item (e.g., In Stock, Out of Stock, Backorder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the category */,
  "video" TEXT /* Video of the category */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., shoulder breadth, upper arm girth) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the measurement */,
  "video" TEXT /* Video of the measurement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the measurement (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item being ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order item (e.g., Shipped, Pending, Cancelled) */,
  "tracking" TEXT /* Tracking information for the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES customer_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., In Stock, Out of Stock, Backorder) */,
  "tracking" TEXT /* Tracking information for the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used (e.g., USPS, UPS, FedEx) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipping (e.g., Shipped, Pending, Cancelled) */,
  "tracking" TEXT /* Tracking information for the shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES customer_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Processed, Pending) */,
  "tracking" TEXT /* Tracking information for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES customer_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the analytics data was collected */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked (e.g., sales, website traffic) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analytics (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the designer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the designer */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Area of specialty for the designer (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "profile" TEXT /* Profile of the designer (e.g., experience, expertise, portfolio) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the designer (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designers_specialty FOREIGN KEY ("specialty") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_managers" (
  "production_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the production manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the production manager */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Area of specialty for the production manager (e.g., inventory, shipping) */,
  "profile" TEXT /* Profile of the production manager (e.g., experience, expertise, portfolio) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the production manager (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_managers_specialty FOREIGN KEY ("specialty") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "sales_representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "territory" TEXT /* Territory assigned to the sales representative (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  "profile" TEXT /* Profile of the sales representative (e.g., experience, expertise, portfolio) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sales representative (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_representatives_territory FOREIGN KEY ("territory") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
